x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Matter team configurations determine how AI Agent task assignments are routed across legal staff. Properly populated matter teams ensure Now Assist recommendations and automated assignments reach the right attorneys and paralegals.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure legal matter teams are configured for each active matter.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_d7f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Matter team configurations determine how AI Agent task assignments are routed across legal staff. Properly populated matter teams ensure Now Assist recommendations and automated assignments reach the right attorneys and paralegals.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Legal Matter Team Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_lg_matter_team_member");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_lg_matter_team_member not found", finding: "Legal Matter Team Member table is not available. Verify the Legal Matter Management plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_matter_team_member");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var c = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (c >= 10) return { status: "ready", actualValue: c + " matter team records", finding: c + " matter team member records found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient team assignment data for AI-assisted matter routing." };
    if (c > 0) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: c + " matter team records", finding: c + " matter team record(s) found (target: 10+). Limited team assignment data reduces Now Assist LSD AI routing accuracy." };
    return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: "0 matter team records", finding: "No matter team member records found. Configure matter team assignments to enable Now Assist LSD AI-assisted matter routing." };
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>LSD</module><number>CHK0000596</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Ensure legal matter teams are configured for each active matter.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>d7f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Legal Matter Team Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_d7f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
